ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(StageName),
NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,"Feature Update")) , Probability >= 0.25, RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', /*Panel Acquisition*/ RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger", $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvcAAE', $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Acquired_Company",
isblank(Product_Sold_Add_Ons__c ),
NOT(ISCHANGED(Related_Meeting__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(SalesLoft1__Most_Recent_Cadence_Name__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(DocuSign_Envelope_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Legal_Request_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Quote_Request_Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Supplier_Questionnaire_Request_Status__c)), ISBLANK(Product_Sold_Add_Ons__c ), MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please make sure to populate the "Product Sold - Add Ons" field in order to proceed
